style.type: bold wayfinding sans with simple supporting text
style.visual_language: clean expo architecture, blue route geometry, strong contrast, minimal copy

layout_requirements.logo_position: top-left below Instagram Story top safe zone
layout_requirements.helper_zone: bottom area above Instagram Story bottom safe zone

hero_visual_requirements: large right or up-right directional arrow visible
blue path or line cue visible
expo hall or architectural grid context visible
